title: Mortgage Rates Surge Amid Iran War Uncertainty
summary: The UK mortgage market is experiencing its most intense turbulence since the mini-Budget of 2022, with mortgage rates rising and nearly 500 products being pulled from the market.

title: UK Government to Publish Mandelson Documents on Wednesday
summary: The UK government will publish internal documents on Lord Mandelson's appointment as British ambassador to the US on Wednesday, following a parliamentary procedure to compel the release of the papers.

title: Meta Acquires Moltbook, Social Media Platform for AI Bots
summary: Meta has acquired Moltbook, a social media platform for AI bots, with plans to develop new ways for AI agents to work for people and businesses.

title: UK Government Bans Al Quds Day March Over Public Disorder Fears
summary: The UK government has banned the annual Al Quds Day march in London due to concerns over public disorder, with a stationary demonstration to be held instead under strict conditions.

title: UK Weather: Met Office Issues Yellow Wind Warning Amid Snow and Cold Return
summary: The Met Office has issued a yellow wind warning for the UK, with strengthening winds developing across the country and temperatures set to drop with a return to wintry weather.

title: Epstein's Aides Still Control His Money and Secrets, Despite Congressional Subpoena
summary: Richard Kahn and Darren Indyke, the sole executors of Jeffrey Epstein's estate, are still controlling his wealth and possessions, despite being subpoenaed to testify before a congressional committee.

title: Insurgents Shake Up Vets Market with Affordable Options
summary: Pet owners in the UK are struggling to afford rising vet bills, which have increased by 63% between 2016 and 2023. The Competition and Markets Authority has launched an investigation into the industry

title: Former Deputy PM Clegg Criticizes University Tuition Fee System
summary: Former Deputy PM Sir Nick Clegg has criticized the university tuition fee system, describing it as "deeply unfair" due to the repeated freezing of graduate repayment thresholds.

title: Epic Raises Fortnite V-Bucks Price Amid Cost Increases

title: Signal Issues Warning After Hackers Target Officials and Users
summary: Signal has issued a warning to users after hackers targeted high-profile users, including officials and journalists, in a Russian-backed campaign. The company advises users to be vigilant against scam

title: Tumbler Ridge Shooting: Family Sues OpenAI Over Alleged Failure to Warn Authorities
summary: The family of Maya Gebala, a 12-year-old girl injured in a Canadian school shooting, has sued OpenAI for allegedly failing to warn authorities about the suspect's plans.

title: FAA Briefly Grounds JetBlue Flights Due to System Outage

title: GPS Jamming Threatens Middle East Maritime Navigation
summary: GPS jamming in the Middle East is causing concern for maritime navigation, with hundreds of ships mysteriously clustered in the wrong locations in waters off Iran, the UAE, and Qatar.

title: Anthropic Sues US Government Over 'Supply Chain Risk' Label
summary: Anthropic, an AI firm, sues the US government over claims it is a 'supply chain risk' and alleges the government's actions were 'unprecedented and unlawful'.

title: London Mayor Courts Embattled AI Firm Anthropic Amid US Tensions
summary: London Mayor Sir Sadiq Khan invites embattled AI firm Anthropic to expand its operations in London, amid a dispute with the US government over access to its AI tools.
